_DOCUMENTATION.model: SIMPLE Crop Model — soil water balance (Zhao et al., 2019)
_DOCUMENTATION.parameter_source: Table 1b of project document (page 18) provides site-specific values. Our three soil-type entries below are MAPPED from those site values to general soil classes for the Philippines context.

water_balance_equations.scs_runoff: S = (25400/RCN) - 254; if rain > 0.2*S: Q = (rain-0.2*S)^2/(rain+0.8*S) else Q=0
water_balance_equations.drainage: Drainage = DDC * PAW (fraction of current PAW drains each day)
water_balance_equations.paw_update: PAW(t+1) = PAW(t) + (rain - Q) - ETa - Drainage; clamped to [0, PAW_max]

units.AWC: m3/m3 — plant-available water capacity fraction = (theta_FC - theta_WP); e.g. 0.16 = 16% of soil volume
units.RCN: dimensionless — SCS-CN2 Runoff Curve Number (higher = more runoff); typical range 60-90
units.DDC: per day (0-1) — deep drainage coefficient: fraction of PAW that drains out per day
units.RZD: mm — effective root zone depth for water balance

_DOCUMENTATION.mapping_note: Clay loam mapped from tomato-Gainesville site (higher AWC, higher RCN). Sandy loam mapped from sweetcorn-Citra site (high DDC, moderate RCN, shorter RZD). Loam is intermediate. All RZD values set to 500mm as a conservative uniform default; crop-specific depths can be added if needed.

clay_loam.name: Clay Loam
clay_loam._source_AWC: Mapped from tomato-Gainesville Table_1b (AWC=0.19); clay loam holds more water
clay_loam._source_RCN: Estimated — clay loam with moderate cover; Table_1b tomato site RCN=85 (poor cover); VERIFY
clay_loam._source_DDC: Mapped from tomato-Gainesville Table_1b (DDC=0.10); clay loam drains slowly
clay_loam._source_RZD: Estimated 500mm conservative default; Table_1b tomato site RZD=800mm; adjust if crop-specific depth known

sandy_loam.name: Sandy Loam
sandy_loam._source_AWC: Estimated — sandy loam holds less water than clay loam; Table_1b sweetcorn AWC=0.25 is sandy soil but high-AWC site; VERIFY
sandy_loam._source_RCN: Estimated — sandy loam with good cover has lower runoff; Table_1b sweetcorn site RCN=60; VERIFY
sandy_loam._source_DDC: Estimated — sandy soils drain much faster than clay; Table_1b sweetcorn DDC=0.70; VERIFY

loam.name: Loam
loam._source_AWC: Estimated — loam intermediate between clay loam and sandy loam; VERIFY against document p.18
